claude-base.description: Shared Claude Code baseline structure and conventions for every repository.

critic.description: A sparring partner that challenges decisions, plans, and assumptions.

repo-sandbox.description: PreToolUse guard that blocks tool calls touching paths outside the current repo.
notes: Blocks file and shell tool calls whose resolved paths fall outside the repo root.
Bypass a legitimate case via user approval, or edit .claude/hooks/repo-sandbox.* directly.

context7.description: Up-to-date code and library documentation via Context7 MCP.
notes: This uses the official remote Context7 MCP endpoint.
Add a CONTEXT7_API_KEY header later if you want higher rate limits.

filesystem.description: Example MCP registration for local filesystem access.
notes: Review the generated MCP definition before enabling it in CI or on shared machines.
